MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2016 Vacated

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SIMPLICITY SOURCE, INC.'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is Off calendar. The case was dismissed on February 4, 2016. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)
